name: Sanathan Astro Services
author: Sanathan App
description: Cached Predictions, Kundali, Personal Guruji AI and push notifications for the Sanathan Astrology platform.
changelog:
1.1.0

  • Phase 2: Personal Guruji AI — per-user profiles, custom/preset avatars, multilingual replies, AIP model selection, chat history.
  • New REST endpoints: /guruji/presets, /guruji/setup, /guruji/profile, /guruji/avatar/upload, /guruji/chat, /guruji/history.
  • Settings redesigned: AIP API key + model dropdown with live sync from AIP.

1.0.0

  • Initial release: Predictions cache, Kundali storage, REST API, Admin UI.
